title: Portfolio Management
auction_option_desc: Set a starting bid and end date.
marketplace_option_desc: Set an asking price and go live on Mazal.
add_plate_hero_desc: Register a number plate in your Mazal portfolio to track estimated value, returns, and listing options — all in one place.
add_plate_feature_1: Track value and performance over time
add_plate_feature_2: See estimated returns at a glance
add_plate_feature_3: List on marketplace or auction when ready
add_plate_justification_placeholder: Tell us anything useful about this plate in your collection...
add_plate_mulkiya_required: Please upload your Mulkiya (vehicle registration card) image.
add_plate_footer_notice: Your plate will appear in your collection once ownership is verified.
